name: Russell
history: History of long work hours in demanding work environments, including past touring work. Unresolved issues with father, including reports of past abuse. Recent exchange of letters with father addressing this history.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must not rely on others because they will let me down.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough to be loved or wanted.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of emotional vulnerability by intellectualizing and distancing from others.
situation: Evaluating progress on personal projects, including developing a website. Spending time on social media instead of working on the project.
auto_thought: I am not good enough, and I will end up alone.
behavior: Avoids emotional intimacy and withdraws from relationships to protect himself from rejection.
